The Mistake Almost Every Creator Makes First

The biggest mistake creators in Pakistan make when selling digital downloads is using platforms like PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad that are notorious for shutting down accounts from restricted countries. These platforms impose strict KYC requirements, making it impossible for creators with limited or no bank accounts to get verified, leaving them with no option but to abandon their stores or risk getting penalized. But it doesn't have to be this way. With the Core Shop Engine, you can bypass these restrictions and sell your digital products confidently, without worrying about your account getting shut down.

The reason why so many creators in Pakistan struggle to get paid is because traditional payment processors like PayPal and Stripe are designed to cater to a specific audience and don't accommodate the needs of creators from restricted countries.
